    "IsA": [
      "It is a watercolour painting.",
      "It is one of J. M. W. Turner's finest works."
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "It has layers of colour wash.",
      "It has fine detail added through cross-hatching.",
      "It has two stars glinting in the yellow morning sky.",
      "It has ducks rising from the lake in the left foreground.",
      "It has dogs chasing the ducks in the right foreground."
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "It is characterized by the transitory effects of light and atmospheric conditions.",
      "It is characterized by blue tonality in the early morning light.",
      "It is characterized by veils of morning mist.",
      "It is characterized by paint scratched out to reveal the bright white ground."
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "It is used for depicting the Rigi mountain in central Switzerland.",
      "It is used for showing the mountain blushed by the evening sun.",
      "It is used for illustrating the frontispiece to the catalogue accompanying an exhibition of Turner's watercolours."

      "It is located in the Tate Gallery in Britain."

    "CausedBy": [
      "It is caused by a gunshot alarming ducks."
    ],
    "Affects": [
      "It affects the ducks rising from the lake."
    ],
    "ConsistsOf": [

      "It consists of fine detail added through cross-hatching.",

      "It is known for its blue tonality in the early morning light.",
      "It is known for the veils of morning mist.",
      "It is known for the two stars glinting in the yellow morning sky.",
      "It is known for the ducks rising from the lake."
    ],
    "AssociatedWith": [
      "It is associated with J. M. W. Turner.",
      "It is associated with the Rigi mountain.",
      "It is associated with the Tate Gallery.",
      "It is associated with John Ruskin.",

  "japanese": {
    "IsA": [
      "それは水彩画です。",
      "それはJ. M. W.ターナーの最高傑作の一つです。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それは色の層を持っています。",
      "それは細い筆によるクロスハッチングで追加された細かいディテールを持っています。",
      "それは黄色い朝の空に輝く二つの星を持っています。",
      "それは前景左側の湖から上昇するアヒルを持っています。",
      "それは前景右側のアヒルを追いかける犬を持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それはリギでの光と大気の過渡的な効果によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは早朝の光の中の青い色調によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは朝霧のベールによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは明るい白い下地を明らかにするために引っかかれた絵によって特徴づけられます。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それはスイス中央部にあるリギ山を描写するために使用されます。",
      "それは夕日によって赤みを帯びた山を示すために使用されます。",
      "それはロイヤル・アカデミーでのターナーの水彩画展に付随するカタログの口絵を説明するために使用されます。"
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "それはイギリスのテート・ギャラリーにあります。"

    "OriginatedIn": [

    ],

    "ProducedBy": [
      "それは10枚の水彩画の商業シリーズの一部として制作されました。"
    ],
    "CausedBy": [
      "それは銃声がアヒルを驚かせたことによって引き起こされます。"
    ],
    "Affects": [
      "それは湖から上昇するアヒルに影響を与えます。"
    ],
    "ConsistsOf": [
      "それは色の層で構成されています。",
      "それは細い筆によるクロスハッチングで追加された細かいディテールで構成されています。",
      "それは黄色い朝の空に輝く二つの星で構成されています。",
      "それは湖から上昇するアヒルで構成されています。",
      "それはアヒルを追いかける犬で構成されています。"
    ],

      "それはターナー・ベクエストの一部です。",
      "それは10枚の水彩画の商業シリーズの一部です。"
    ],
    "MemberOf": [
      "それはターナーのリギ・シリーズの一員です。"
    ],
    "BelongsTo": [
      "それはテート・ギャラリーに属しています。"
    ],
    "KnownFor": [
      "それはリギでの光と大気の過渡的な効果を捉えていることで知られています。",
      "それは早朝の光の中の青い色調で知られています。",
      "それは朝霧のベールで知られています。",
      "それは黄色い朝の空に輝く二つの星で知られています。",
      "それは湖から上昇するアヒルで知られています。"
    ],
    "AssociatedWith": [
      "それはJ. M. W.ターナーと関連があります。",
      "それはリギ山と関連があります。",
      "それはテート・ギャラリーと関連があります。",

      "それはエラナン・ビクネルと関連があります。",
      "それはジョン・エドワード・テイラーと関連があります。",

      "それはモード・ジョーンズと関連があります。",
      "それは「ブルー・リギを救え」キャンペーンと関連があります。"

      "それはリギ山にちなんで名付けられました。"

      "それは1842年に起こりました。"

      "それは2007年にテート・ギャラリーで開催された展覧会で展示されました。",

      "それはリギでの光と大気の過渡的な効果についてです。",
      "それはルツェルン湖の対岸から南西の視点で見た、スイス中央部にあるリギ山についてです。"
    ],
    "InfluencedBy": [
      "それは前年の夏のスイス訪問の影響を受けています。",
      "それはリギ山の影響を受けています。",
      "それはリギでの光と大気の過渡的な効果の影響を受けています。"
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "それは美術批評家がターナーのリギ・シリーズの異なる作品を色で説明する方法に影響を与えました。",
      "それは紙媒体のイギリス作品の記録に影響を与えました。"
    ]
  }

IsA: It is one of J. M. W. Turner's finest works.
HasA: It has layers of colour wash.
It has fine detail added through cross-hatching.
It has two stars glinting in the yellow morning sky.
It has ducks rising from the lake in the left foreground.
It has dogs chasing the ducks in the right foreground.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the transitory effects of light and atmospheric conditions.
It is characterized by blue tonality in the early morning light.
It is characterized by veils of morning mist.
It is characterized by paint scratched out to reveal the bright white ground.
UsedFor: It is used for depicting the Rigi mountain in central Switzerland.
It is used for showing the mountain blushed by the evening sun.
It is used for illustrating the frontispiece to the catalogue accompanying an exhibition of Turner's watercolours.
LocatedIn: It is located in the Tate Gallery in Britain.
OriginatedIn: It originated in the Rigi, a mountain in the Alps in Central Switzerland.
CreatedBy: It was created by J. M. W. Turner.
PublishedIn: It was published in the catalogue accompanying an exhibition of Turner's watercolours at the Royal Academy.
ProducedBy: It was produced as part of a commercial series of ten watercolours.
CausedBy: It is caused by a gunshot alarming ducks.
Affects: It affects the ducks rising from the lake.
ConsistsOf: It consists of layers of colour wash.
It consists of fine detail added through cross-hatching.
It consists of two stars glinting in the yellow morning sky.
It consists of ducks rising from the lake.
It consists of dogs chasing the ducks.
PartOf: It is part of the Turner Bequest.
It is part of a commercial series of ten watercolours.
MemberOf: It is a member of Turner's Rigi series.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the Tate Gallery.
KnownFor: It is known for capturing the transitory effects of light and atmospheric conditions at the Rigi.
It is known for its blue tonality in the early morning light.
It is known for the veils of morning mist.
It is known for the two stars glinting in the yellow morning sky.
It is known for the ducks rising from the lake.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with J. M. W. Turner.
It is associated with the Rigi mountain.
It is associated with the Tate Gallery.
It is associated with John Ruskin.
It is associated with Elhanan Bicknell.
It is associated with John Edward Taylor.
It is associated with Sir Frank Short.
It is associated with Walter H. Jones.
It is associated with Maud Jones.
It is associated with the "Save the Blue Rigi" appeal.
NamedAfter: It is named after the Rigi mountain.
HeldIn: It was held in an exhibition at the Tate Gallery in 2007.
It was held in an exhibition at the Tate Gallery in 2014.
About: It is about the Rigi mountain.
It is about the transitory effects of light and atmospheric conditions at the Rigi.
It is about the Rigi mountain in central Switzerland, viewed from the southwest across Lake Lucerne.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Turner's visit to Switzerland the previous summer.
It was influenced by the Rigi mountain.
It was influenced by the transitory effects of light and atmospheric conditions at the Rigi.
Influenced: It influenced the way art critics describe the different members of Turner's Rigi series by their colours.
It influenced the record for a British work on paper.
